commit_summaries.message:
clean up exception handlers

- removed assignment of exception to variable if it was unused
- logging exception Logger.error and Logger.exception is redundant
- logging.Logger.exception doesn't need the exception as an argument
use f-string for logging.getLogger name argument
use f-string for Thread name argument
u-strings are now just regular str
use f-string to set some headers and an error frame body
fix invalid escape sequences in content_length_re

allow logging module to apply format to args

The Logger API expects a format string and a list of args to be
formatted, not an already formatted string.
fix two more Python 2-style abstract base class definitions
remove `next()` methods from QueueFrameIterator and FrameBuffer
convert set builtin call with list comp argument to a set comp
add `test_` to a test method's name
